name: io.github.seojeom/seojeom-mcp
description: Local-first MCP server for Claude/Codex project wiki and graph workflows

packageArguments.name: --project-root
packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the user's project directory (contains wiki/ and .seojeom/).

packageArguments.name: --project-id
packageArguments.description: Stable project identifier used in graph/wiki file paths.

packageArguments.name: --graph-authority
packageArguments.description: Graph authority mode. Use local-snapshot for fully local operation.

packageArguments.name: --approval-mode
packageArguments.description: How mutations are approved. 'prompt' asks the user; 'always' auto-approves.
